box.title: 🚀 Modern Web Foundations

list.text: SolidStart: The future of Solid.js.
Hono: The fast, lightweight web framework.
Elite Technical Architect
Full-stack Performance Enthusiast

box.title: Aravind Govindhasamy

slides.title: 1. SolidStart Basics
slides.subtitle: File-routing, Islands, and the Zero-Config Dream.

list.text: File-routing: Natural, intuitive structure.
Islands: Partial hydration for maximum client speed.

box.title: A meta-framework for Solid.js that provides a unified way to build full-stack applications with high performance.

box.code:
src/
  routes/
    index.tsx
    users/
      [id].tsx
box.title: SolidStart uses a `src/routes` directory for file-based routing, supporting both static and dynamic segments.
Easily define server-side endpoints within your routing structure using `.api.ts` files.

list.text: Versatile: Deploy where your users are.
Simple Config: Define your adapter in `app.config.ts`.

box.title: SolidStart supports various deployment targets like Vercel, Netlify, Cloudflare, and Bun through specialized adapters.

box.code:
const [count, setCount] = createSignal(0);
setCount(c => c + 1);
box.title: The fundamental atom of reactivity in Solid.js. They hold a value and track dependencies automatically.

box.code: const doubleCount = createMemo(() => count() * 2);
box.title: A derived signal that caches its value and only re-executes when its dependencies change.
Handles side effects that synchronize with reactive state changes.

list.text: Fast: Incredible performance benchmarks.
Predictable: No hidden reconciliation magic.

box.title: Solid compiles to direct DOM manipulations, avoiding the overhead of a Virtual DOM diffing process.

slides.title: 3. Ultra-fast Routing
slides.subtitle: The Hono framework on the Edge.

list.text: Performant: One of the fastest routers in existence.
Lightweight: Zero dependencies and tiny bundle size.

box.title: A small, fast, and runtime-agnostic web framework that runs anywhere: Bun, Node, Cloudflare Workers, etc.
Clean, intuitive API for defining routes and extracting parameters.

box.code:
app.use('/api/*', logger);
app.use('/admin/*', basicAuth({ ... }));
box.title: Composable middleware for logging, authentication, CORS, and more.

list.text: Request: `c.req` for headers, params, body.
Response: `c.json`, `c.text`, `c.html` helper methods.

box.title: The central object for handling requests, responses, environment variables, and more.
Functions that always run on the server, but can be called from the client as if they were local asynchronous functions.

list.text: Shared Types: No manual type definitions required.
Validation: Combined with Zod for robust input checking.

box.title: Server functions provide automatic type inference between the server implementation and the client call.
Use `createAction` to handle form submissions and mutations with built-in loading states and feedback.

list.text: Pending States: Easy access to loading indicators.
Optimistic UI: Update state before the server responds.

box.title: SolidStart's use of `useTransition` and `useAction` ensures a smooth user experience during data mutations.

list.text: Low TTFB: Faster initial page load for users.
Progressive: Components render as soon as their data is ready.

box.title: Sending HTML in chunks as it's generated, allowing the browser to start rendering parts of the page earlier.

box.code:
// Only this island is hydrated
<Navbar /> 
<StaticContent />
<InteractiveGallery />
box.title: Only hydrate the interactive parts of your page, keeping the rest as static HTML to minimize JavaScript.

list.text: Minimal JS: Dramatically reduce the TTI (Time to Interactive).
Lighthouse: Boost your performance scores significantly.

box.title: Fine-tuning which components need hydration and when (e.g., on visible, on idle).

box.code: app.get('/static/*', cache({ cacheName: 'my-cache', cacheControl: 'max-age=3600' }));
box.title: Using Hono's weightless footprint to implement smart caching strategies at the network edge.
A feature that allows you to share your API types with your frontend, providing full IDE autocompletion and type checking.

box.code: const res = await client.user[':id'].$get({ param: { id: '123' } });
box.title: Hono RPC handles dynamic segments and query parameters with full type awareness.
Using Hono's WebSocket helpers to build real-time applications that scale globally.

list.text: Live Updates: Push data from Hono to Solid components.
Shared State: Keeping the client and server in perfect sync.

box.title: Connecting WebSocket events directly to Solid signals for instant UI updates.
SolidStart's adapter system makes it easy to target edge runtimes like Cloudflare Workers and Vercel Edge.

list.text: Wrangler: Use Cloudflare's CLI for seamless deployment.
Durable Objects: Handle stateful edge computing with ease.

box.title: Deploying your Hono backend and SolidStart frontend as a single, ultra-fast Worker.
Fast, Vite-native testing for your Solid components and reactive logic.

box.code:
const res = await app.request('/api/health');
expect(res.status).toBe(200);
box.title: Isolated testing of your Hono API logic by calling route handlers directly in your test suite.

box.code:
const ThemeContext = createContext();
<ThemeContext.Provider value={theme}>...</ThemeContext.Provider>
box.title: Providing state to deeply nested components without prop drilling, with full reactivity.

box.code:
const [state, setState] = createStore({ user: { name: 'Solid' } });
setState('user', 'name', 'New Name');
box.title: A high-performance primitive for managing complex nested objects and arrays with fine-grained updates.

box.code:
// state.ts
export const [isLoggedIn, setIsLoggedIn] = createSignal(false);
box.title: Signals can be defined outside of components, making them ideal for simple global state sharing.

list.text: Intuitive: Logic and UI stay perfectly synced.
Decoupled: Easy to move state logic into separate files.

box.title: How Solid's reactivity system eliminates the need for heavy state management libraries like Redux.
The atomic CSS engine that provides instant styling with zero runtime overhead.

list.text: Productive: Fast styling directly in your markup.
Design System: Leverage Tailwind's robust ecosystem.

box.title: Standardized utility-first styling for consistent design systems.

box.code:
import { style } from '@vanilla-extract/css';
export const container = style({ padding: '20px' });
box.title: Using libraries like `vanilla-extract` for type-safe CSS that compiles to static files.

list.text: Dark Mode: Instant theme switching without refreshing.
Dynamic Styles: UI that responds to state changes instantly.

box.title: Combining Solid's reactivity with CSS variables for dynamic, high-performance themes.

box.code:
const UserSchema = z.object({ name: z.string() });
app.post('/user', zValidator('json', UserSchema), (c) => { ... });
box.title: The industry standard for schema-based validation, perfectly integrated with Hono and SolidStart.

box.code: const User = Type.Object({ name: Type.String() });
box.title: A high-performance alternative to Zod that provides ultra-fast runtime validation with TypeScript inference.

list.text: Shared Folder: Centralize your schemas and types.
Consistency: Zero drift between client and server logic.

box.title: Structuring your project to share business logic and validation schemas across the full-stack boundary.

list.text: Reliable: Catch and handle errors gracefully.
Fallback UI: Keep your app functional even when things go wrong.

box.title: Unified error responses using Hono's `onError` hook and SolidStart's `ErrorBoundary` component.

list.text: Speed: Near-instant interactions and pageloads.
Safety: Types that flow from database to DOM.
Simplicity: A minimalist but powerful developer experience.

box.title: The combination of SolidStart's reactive power and Hono's edge performance is a game-changer for modern web apps.

list.text: Growth: Solid.js continues to lead in performance.
Innovation: Hono is redefining how we think about web frameworks.

box.title: As the ecosystem grows, expect even better tooling, faster runtimes, and more seamless integrations.
Think in signals. Deploy to the edge. Build with Solid and Hono.
Thank you! Any questions?
